headline: Smith (A.O.) Corp (NYSE:AOS) Dividend Screen Highlights Strong Payouts, Profitability, and Financial Health
summary: Smith (A.O.) Corp (AOS) offers a strong dividend stock with a 2.36% yield, low payout ratio, top profitability, and solid financial health for sustainable income growth.
